# DineWipes

> Single-use, individually sealed, alcohol-free wet wipes for restaurants, cafes and hotels. Based in Hyderabad, India, with pan-India shipping.

DineWipes supplies branded and standard single wet wipes to hospitality businesses. Standard DineWipes-branded packs have no minimum order and ship within 48 hours anywhere in India, priced at ₹1.95 per wipe. Custom logo-branded wipes are also available with a 2-3 week lead time, a minimum order of 10,000 units, and pricing based on quantity.

## Key facts

- Product: individually sealed, alcohol-free single-use wet wipes
- Standard pack pricing: ₹1.95 per wipe, no minimum order, ships in 48 hours across India
- Custom branded pack pricing: quantity-based, minimum order 10,000 units, 2-3 week lead time
- Hygiene: every wipe individually sealed and manufactured under strict hygiene protocols
- Location: Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- Service area: Hyderabad, Telangana, and pan-India delivery
- Contact: hello@dinewipes.in, WhatsApp ordering available

## Pages

- [Home](https://dinewipes.in/): Overview, product info, ordering
- [DineWipes Branded](https://dinewipes.in/brand.html): Standard DineWipes-branded packs, no minimum order
- [Custom Branded](https://dinewipes.in/custom.html): Custom logo-branded wipes for restaurants and cafes
- [Blog](https://dinewipes.in/blog.html): Guides on restaurant hygiene, branded wet wipes, and hospitality amenities
